ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique Stock Keeping Unit identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (if applicable) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the product (if applicable) */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Seals, Handles) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Reference to the SKU of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity before reorder is necessary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last reordered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, shipped) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES billing_addresses ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which this item belongs */,
  "sku" TEXT /* SKU of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "final_price" TEXT /* Final price after discounts and taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_addresses" (
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing address */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_addresses_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)
